rules_description.meal_limit_per_entry: Single meal expenses above this amount require pre-approval and should be flagged.
rules_description.approval_required_above: Any single expense above this amount requires documented pre-approval.
rules_description.near_threshold_buffer: Flag expenses within this dollar amount below the approval threshold as a potential structuring/avoidance pattern.
rules_description.disallowed_categories: Expense categories that should never be reimbursed via corporate card.
rules_description.receipt_required_above: Expenses above this amount must have a receipt attached.
rules_description.duplicate_match_fields: Fields used to detect duplicate submissions of the same expense.
